error_signature: you must specify a unique_id header and value
title: Missing unique_id header in HTTP request
symptom: When executing the HTTP request node, an error message states 'you must specify a unique_id header and value'.
applies_when: Executing the node with required parameters
not_this_if: The unique_id header is already set correctly
root_cause: The HTTP request node requires a specific header named 'unique_id' to be included in the request. If this header is missing or incorrectly named, the request will fail with the specified error message.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP request node settings
Provide the appropriate value for the unique_id
Save the workflow and re-execute the node
agent_instruction: Ensure the 'unique_id' header is correctly set in the HTTP request node.
